description: An official letter from an educational institution detailing the financial aid package, including grants, scholarships, and loans offered to a student.

first_name.instruction: First name of the student receiving financial aid.

school_name.instruction: Name of the college, university, or school issuing the financial aid award package. The school name may indicate if it is located in another state.

academic_year.instruction: The specific academic school year the aid applies to, such as 2024-2025.

grant_amount.instruction: Grant or scholarship portion (excluded income). Does not need to be repaid.

loan_amount.instruction: Loan portion of the aid package.

disbursement_date.instruction: Date aid was or will be disbursed. YYYY-MM-DD format.

aid_type.instruction: Type of aid (Pell Grant, SEOG, state grant, institutional, etc.).

total_cost_of_attendance.instruction: The estimated gross cost to attend the school for the year, including tuition, fees, and housing.
